div.head: The Ambassador in Brazil (Caffery) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Sir: Referring to recent reports concerning additional concessions in Brazil desired by our Navy, I have the honor to transmit herewith a copy of part of a memorandumNot printed; recommendations were to establish a blimp base at Maceio” and mast facilities at seven other places, and to establish partial facilities at each base for one ship in earliest possible time. prepared for me by Rear Admiral Beauregard giving a summary of the main recommendations “made by the blimp board which were forwarded to Washington with Admiral Ingram’s concurrence and recommendation for earliest possible commencement of work.”
